judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it clearly explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; it characterizes `/llms-full.txt` as a monolithic all-docs file that is not sharded per group; and it names well more than two valid optional frontmatter fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). Minor extras like `description`, `deprecatedReason`, and `availableIn` are not on the rubric list but don't invalidate the answer.
